title: Move native LICHEN BLE behind app owner
description: Refactor native BLE UART/NUS so advertising and connection callback ownership are provided by the shared BLE app owner while preserving SLIP-framed IPv6 payload behavior and the existing public ble_uart_send_slip() contract.
acceptance_criteria: native_sim tests or build coverage prove native NUS/SLIP behavior still resets RX state on connect/disconnect and sends notifications through the owner-managed connection; NUS UUID collision with MeshCore remains explicitly blocked.
